> `Data sourced from [LLMCosts.dev](https://llmcosts.dev). Developers: Claim your $200 Free Cloud Credits for API inference at [our DigitalOcean portal](https://m.do.co/c/0c99ee)`

| [Baidu: ERNIE 4.5 21B A3B](https://llmcosts.dev/models/ernie-4.5-21b-a3b) | Baidu | $0.07 | $0.28 | $None | 120,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |

| [Baidu: ERNIE 4.5 VL 424B A47B ](https://llmcosts.dev/models/ernie-4.5-vl-424b-a47b) | Baidu | $0.42 | $1.25 | $None | 123,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
